title: Application / opportunity
description: The INPUT record for one opportunity — inbound application or outbound-sourced repo alike (one funnel, per screen.md). Validated at load time by load_application(), before any model call: this schema is shape; the load-bearing content-sufficiency checks (placeholders, thinness) live code-side in gate_application(), mirroring the wire_schema discipline. Never sent on the wire.

one_liner.description: What the company does, one sentence. The screen cannot judge an opportunity that cannot state itself.

background_claimed.description: Founder's own account of their background — claimed, not verified. Verification is Memory/signals territory.

deck_claims.description: The deck's factual claims, one string each. Absence blocks advancement at the screen (missing_minimums), not at the gate.

ask.description: What the founder is asking for. Optional: outbound-sourced opportunities have no ask.

source.description: Provenance for sourced records, e.g. 'sourced-github:<archive>'. Inbound applications omit it.
